# claudeadmin_tunnels (Data Source)

Lists MCP tunnels. Beta — requires OAuth Bearer auth.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_tunnels" "active" {
  include_archived = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean)
- `workspace_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `tunnels` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tunnels))

<a id="nestedatt--tunnels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tunnels`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)
